_comment: NSE equity/F&O trading holidays for calendar year 2026, YYYY-MM-DD (IST). Full official list per NSE circular NSE/CMTR/71775 (Circular Ref. No: 172/2025, dated December 12, 2025). Weekend-falling holidays (Mahashivratri 2026-02-15, Id-Ul-Fitr 2026-03-21, Independence Day 2026-08-15, Diwali Laxmi Pujan 2026-11-08) are omitted — HolidayManager already excludes weekends. Muhurat Trading (Sunday 2026-11-08) is intentionally NOT a scan day. Refresh this list from the official December circular every year.
